degradedStates: local Postgres service or scout database is unavailable
worker heartbeat is stale or missing
optional AI or handoff endpoint is unavailable
provider mode is seeded or preview-only

records: Postgres scout_runs queue and run repository records
legacy local JSON runs for explicit import compatibility
secrets: DATABASE_URL in local env or packaged desktop env file
optional OpenAI or provider credentials in backend environment
logs: desktop web and worker process output
operator QA and packaged runtime verification output

security.networkPolicy: desktop runtime binds local web and worker services to loopback and uses bounded provider adapters instead of open crawling
sensitiveActions: AI assistance must be grounded in stored Scout evidence
handoff delivery records receipts instead of silently mutating sibling apps
